name: zen-translate
description: Split-screen translation powered by local AI (Ollama)

scripts.build:test: rm -rf dist && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts --mode test && vite build --mode test
scripts.start:zen: npm run build:test && npx web-ext run --source-dir dist/ --firefox /home/vladozz/Загрузки/zen/zen/zen-bin
scripts.start:firefox: npm run build:test && npx web-ext run --source-dir dist/ --firefox /usr/bin/firefox
